pan-cake-teleculinaria.name: Pan Cake
instructions: Light a pot with the water and lemon zest and let it boil. Remove from the fire, add the coffee and flour, stir well and let rest for 1 hour.
After the time indicated, add the sugar, brandy, honey, olive oil, sweet herb, cocoa, chocolate, cinnamon and salt and mix well.

Bind a round shape (about 22 cm in diameter) with the lard and pour the previous preparation into it. Take it in the oven, preheated to 170oC, for about 40 minutes. Remove, deform, let cool and serve.

papajoes-coleslaw-for-bbq-samiches-sandw.name: Papajoe's Coleslaw For Bbq Samiches (sandwiches For Normal Folk)
instructions: Combine cabbage and carrots in a large bowl; set aside.

Whisk salad dressing, mayonnaise, buttermilk, sour cream, honey, cider vinegar, lemon juice, salt, pesto, mustard, cayenne pepper, celery seeds, onion powder, black pepper, and garlic powder together in a medium bowl until smooth and creamy.

Pour ½ dressing over cabbage-carrot mixture; toss to coat. Gradually stir in remaining ½ dressing until coleslaw reaches desired consistency. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap; refrigerate until flavors combine, at least 3 hours.

pasta-recipe-in-a-mug-lezzet.name: Pasta Recipe In A Mug

2. Add boiled pasta to this mixture.
3. Add half of the cheese.

5. Spread the remaining cheese on it.
6. 180°C bake 15–20 minutes in oven.

pasta-with-cherry-tomatoes-and-feta-chee.name: Pasta With Cherry Tomatoes And Feta Cheese In The Air Fryer, The Viral Tiktok Recipe
pasta-with-cherry-tomatoes-and-feta-chee.original_name: Pasta con Tomates Cherry y Queso Feta en Freidora de Aire, la receta viral de TikTok

ingredients.item: 200 g of pasta (you can choose your best but short noodles such as fusilli or penne work very well)

instructions: It purifies the airfryer to 180 been 3 been (177 been 3). That step's essential to make sure everything's been cooked evenly. Wash the cherry tomatoes and put them into a bowl that you can put into the air frying Peel his teeth garlic and into a mortar with some machar salt (if you want to avoid repeating the garlic removes the central outbreak). Add some olive oil to make a dough with garlic. Expand garlic mixture onto tomatoes and remove them to impregnate throughout. Add salt, pepper and herbs as you wish: oregano, rosemary, thyme, etc...

At the centre of the container place the Feta cheese block at the centre of the container, surrounded by tomatoes. Roast all with olive oil, making sure that both tomatoes and cheese are well covered.

Enter the container into the airfryer and cook for 15 minutes, or until the tomatoes are broken and the Feta cheese has been slightly golden at the edges. Check and remove the ingredients at half the cooking to make sure they are cooked evenly.
Meanwhile, we cook the dough into a large pot with saltwater following the package's instructions. Listen and book a cup of cooking water.

Once the tomatoes and Feta cheese are ready, get them out of the airfryer. With a spoon, mix well with tomatoes, Feta and garlic and get a creamy sauce. If the mixture is too thick, add some of the cooking water from the dough to achieve the desired consistency.
Add the baked dough to the bowl with the sauce and mix well so that all the dough will be well covered. Adjust salt and pepper to taste.
Sirve la pasta en platos y disfruta de esta deliciosa pasta con salsa de tomates cherry y queso feta

pasta-with-pesto-shrimp-and-cured-ham.name: Pasta With Pesto, Shrimp, And Cured Ham
instructions: Blend garlic, nuts, 1 tsp. salt, and 1 ice cube in a blender on low speed to a coarse paste. Add basil, 1 cup oil, and 2 Tbsp. ice water and purée until basil is almost incorporated. Add Parmesan and Pecorino; blend to combine. Transfer pesto to a medium bowl. Cover with plastic wrap, pressing directly onto surface.
Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving ½ cup pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook Speck, stirring occasionally, until browned, about 2 minutes. Add shrimp; season with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing occasionally, until shrimp are just cooked through, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat; toss in pesto, pasta, and pasta cooking liquid.
DO AHEAD: Pesto can be made 3 days ahead. Top with a little oil; cover and chill.

pastitsio-the-greek-baked-macaroni-pie-p.name: Pastitsio, The Greek Baked Macaroni Pie
pastitsio-the-greek-baked-macaroni-pie-p.original_name: Pastitsio, el pastel de macarrones al horno griego

Add the red wine and let cook till evaporate. Add tomato purée, oregano, salt and pepper. Revolves well and lets cook at low heat for about 20 minutes.

In a big pot, melt butter over medium heat. Add the flour and stir constantly until golden. Add hot milk little by little, stirring constantly to prevent them from growing up. Add salt and pepper and let them cook at low heat for about 10 minutes. Beat the eggs into a bowl and add some salt and pepper Add a tablespoon of the bechamel sauce to the eggs and mix well. Add the egg mixture to the becham sauce and stir well. Add half of the parmesan cheese and stir up till well incorporated.
It purifies the oven at 180 and 3. He steals his dough with salt and olive oil for about 10 minutes, till she's at the dente. Drain the dough and mix with olive oil and black pepper.

En un recipiente grande para horno, coloca primero una capa de bechamel, y luego dos capas de pasta en el fondo. Agrega una capa de salsa de carne por encima. Coloca varias capas de pasta encima de la salsa de carne. Cubre con la salsa bechamel. Espolvorea el resto del queso parmesano rallado por encima.
Hornite pastitsio for about 45 minutes, till it's golden and crispy above. Remove from the oven and leave to stand for a few minutes before serving.

pea-cream-recipe-comedera.name: Pea Cream Recipe
pea-cream-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de crema de guisantes rápida
instructions: I start with minting an onion into very small pieces. Some people do not use onion in their peas cream preparations, but from an important point of view, this ingredient gives an aromatic base to the plate. To me it's almost irreplaceable.
We'll also care about garlic. We'll skin our teeth and we'll mingle them, or better still, we'll shredder them.

Then we'll have to get an anti-stick, good size pan. We will warm with some butter, very quickly, so that this ingredient will be ground but without getting dark. That would change the flavors we want to give to the plate. It's very important that we do not get distracted at this step.
Para continuar, agregaremos la cebolla y los ajos, y los sofreiremos durante cinco minutos, removiendo constantemente.
After this time, we'll put in the peas. As they get frosted, we'll move them and separate them with a kitchen spoon to accelerate cooking.
Daremos cinco minutos a los guisantes para que se vayan deshaciendo y cocinando. Durante este tiempo, los moveremos con frecuencia.
Pasados los diez minutos, verteremos el caldo, mezclaremos, taparemos y dejaremos cocinar por 10 minutos.
After this time we will pass the contents of the pot to a blender. Before we liquidate the ingredients, we will add a touch of salt and another of pepper to our taste. We'll also add the milk cream.
We'll process all the ingredients till we get a cream as thin as we can.

Once we have obtained the desired consistency, we will check the date and if necessary we will correct with more salt or pepper, or both. If we feel that the cream has been very thick, we can add more bald or otherwise water. If we have been very clear, we can add more milk cream to give them more body.
The peas cream should be served hot. If it's been cold during the liquefied process, we can get her back into the pot and warm her up for a few more minutes.
That's all. Peas cream's ready.

peach-crisp.name: Peach Crisp
instructions: Arrange sliced peaches evenly in an 8x8-inch baking dish.
Mix flour, brown sugar, butter, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl using a pastry cutter until crumbly.
Fold oats into flour mixture.
Sprinkle mixture evenly over peaches, pressing down lightly.
Bake in the preheated oven until crispy and golden brown on top, about 30 minutes. Enjoy!

peach-tres-leches-individual-trifles.name: Peach Tres Leches Individual Trifles
instructions: Make the sponge cake: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C). Coat a 9-inch square baking pan with cooking spray. Set aside.
Microwave the milk and butter in a microwaveable bowl on HIGH for about 90 seconds, stopping to stir every 45 seconds, until the mixture is melted. Stir in the vanilla until combined, and set aside.
Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt together in a medium bowl. Set aside.

Place the eggs, egg yolk, and sugar in a large bowl. Beat with an electric mixer on high speed for about 5 minutes, or until the mixture doubles in volume. Fold in the flour mixture in 2 additions, folding to combine after each addition. Microwave the milk-butter mixture for about 15 seconds to re-warm it, then add it to the egg-flour mixture. Beat on medium speed for 1–2 minutes, until combined.

Transfer the mixture to the prepared 9-inch baking pan. Bake for 25–30 minutes, until a toothpick inserted in the center of the cake comes out clean. Remove from the oven, and let the cake cool completely, 2–3 hours.

Make the peach filling: Peel the peaches, and cut them into 1-inch cubes. Place the peaches, brown sugar, granulated sugar, orange juice, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a medium saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until combined, about 2 minutes. Bring the mixture to a boil. Boil, stirring occasionally, until the mixture thickens, about 7 minutes. Remove from heat, and transfer to a heatproof bowl. Let cool completely, about 1 hour.
Make the milk blend: Whisk together the condensed milk, whole milk, evaporated milk, vanilla, and cinnamon in a large bowl until combined. Set aside.

Make the whipped cream: Beat the whipping cream, sugar, and vanilla in a large bowl with an electric mixer on low speed for 2–3 minutes, until it begins to thicken. Increase the mixer speed to high, and beat for 2–3 minutes, until stiff peaks form. Set aside.

To assemble, cut the sponge cake into small pieces. Divide them evenly among 4 serving cups. Pour the milk blend evenly over the cake pieces in the cups. Divide about 3 tablespoons of the peach filling evenly among the 4 cups (store the remaining filling in the fridge for up to 5 days). Top the cups with the whipped cream, and garnish with cinnamon. Serve immediately, or store in the fridge for up to 5 days.
Enjoy!

peaches-and-cream-shortcakes-with-cornme.name: Peaches And Cream Shortcakes With Cornmeal-orange Biscuits
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Line large baking sheet with parchment paper. Mix 1/4 cup sugar and orange peel in small bowl, mashing peel with back of spoon until mixture is pale orange.

Whisk flour, cornmeal, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt in large bowl. Add butter; rub in with fingertips until mixture forms coarse meal. Add 2/3 cup milk; stir with fork until dough is evenly moistened, adding more milk by tablespoonfuls if dry. Drop dough by 1/3 cupfuls onto prepared sheet, forming 8 mounds and spacing 1 1/2 inches apart. Using fingertips, flatten each biscuit to 2-inch round. Sprinkle with orange sugar.

Bake biscuits until golden brown and tester inserted into centers comes out clean, about 18 minutes; transfer to rack. DO AHEAD Can be made 8 hours ahead. Cool completely. Store airtight at room temperature.
Toss peaches, 1/3 cup sugar, and vanilla in large bowl; let stand 15 minutes, tossing occasionally.
Using electric mixer, beat cream and sugar in medium bowl until peaks form.
Using serrated knife, cut each biscuit horizontally in half. Place bottom halves on plates. Spoon peaches and their juices onto each biscuit. Top with whipped cream and biscuit tops.
If parchment paper is difficult to find, you can butter and flour the baking sheet instead.

pecan-butter-with-sorghum.name: Pecan Butter With Sorghum

ingredients.item: Sorghum syrup or robust flavored (dark) molasses

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pecans, tossing occasionally, until slightly darkened and very fragrant, 12–15 minutes. Let cool slightly. Pulse pecans, sorghum, and salt in a food processor, scraping down sides as needed, until a smooth, shiny paste forms.
Do Ahead: Nut butter can be made 2 weeks ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

penne-with-almond-pesto-and-green-beans.name: Penne With Almond Pesto And Green Beans

ingredients.item: Plus 2 tablespoons coarsely chopped toasted almonds

instructions: Pulse garlic, basil, 1/2 cup almonds, and 1 tsp. salt in a food processor until combined. With the motor running, slowly add oil and pulse again until smooth. Transfer to a large bowl.

Cook penne in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, and add green beans 30 seconds before pasta is al dente. Drain pasta and green beans, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid, and add to pesto. Stir vigorously and add pasta cooking liquid as needed to fully coat. Season with salt.
Transfer pasta mixture to a serving bowl or platter and top with Parmesan and remaining 2 Tbsp. almonds. Serve immediately or at room temperature.

pennes-in-the-air-fryer-with-cherry-toma.name: Pennes In The Air Fryer With Cherry Tomatoes And Feta Cheese
pennes-in-the-air-fryer-with-cherry-toma.original_name: Πένες στο air fryer με ντοματίνια και φέτα

ingredients.item: 1-2 cots fresh basil + a few more leaves
2 tablespoon olive oil + extra in spray
1-2 cots fresh basil + a few more leaves
2 tablespoon olive oil + extra in spray

instructions: Cut the tomatoes in half and add them to a bowl.
Add the olive oil (2 tablespoons), garlic, some salt, pepper, oregano and balsamic vinegar. Mix them to lower their juices.
Place the mixture with the tomatoes in the disposable air fryer container.
Add the royal stems.
Cut the slice into 3-4 pieces and divide it to the surface.
Spray with oil spray and bake for 17 minutes at 200
Remove the peel from the garlic and melt its flesh into the tomatoes. Bake for 2 more minutes.
At the same time, boil the pens in plenty of salted water.
We drag them – keep some of their water – and pour them into the Baked injectors.
Mix, sprinkle with a few drops of olive oil and a few drops of pasta water.
Finally, add basil leaves and serve immediately on dishes

pennes-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Pennes In The Oven

ingredients.item: A little olive oil for the baking pan
A little olive oil for the baking pan

instructions: Boil the pens in plenty of salted water for 5 minutes.
We're cutting up the mozzarella.
Melt in a bowl with the fork, sprinkle with some water and mix to obtain a creamy texture.
We bribe the base and walls of a small fireproof vessel. Pour in the ready tomato sauce.
Add the pens first, sprinkle them with minimal olive oil, and then the mozzarella and half the parmesan. Mix.
Integrate the melted anthotyr by gently mixing. Finally rub some pepper and sprinkle with the rest of the parmesan.
Cover and seal the baking pan with non-stick paper and aluminum foil and bake in a pre-heated oven, at 200
Remove the anti-stick paper and foil and continue baking for a few more minutes, to brown the surface of the food.
Garnish with basil leaves and enjoy.

pheasant-pot-pie.name: Pheasant Pot Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Bring broth to a boil in a pot; add pheasant, carrots, and celery and boil until pheasant is cooked through, about 15 minutes. Add peas to broth and boil for 1 minute. Drain and reserve broth from pot.

Melt butter in a separate pot over medium heat; cook and stir onion until translucent, about 5 minutes. Gradually stir flour into butter until smooth. Pour reserved broth and milk into flour mixture, stirring constantly. Add salt, rosemary, pepper, sage, and celery seed to broth mixture and simmer over medium-low heat until sauce is thickened, about 5 minutes.
Lower oven temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Press 1 pie crust into a pie plate and lightly brush with egg white.
Bake crust in the oven until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.

Spoon about 1/4 of the pheasant-vegetable mixture into the baked pie crust. Mix remaining pheasant-vegetable mixture into the sauce; pour into baked pie crust. Place second crust on top of the filling, pinching the edges together to form a seal. Cut your initials into the top crust for ventilation.
Bake in the oven until top is golden brown, about 40 minutes.

phyllo-shish-meatballs-lezzet.name: Phyllo Shish Meatballs
instructions: 1. Remember to add these delicious recipes to your list for your invitations.

pigs-in-a-blanket-with-sauerkraut-and-mu.name: Pigs-in-a-blanket With Sauerkraut And Mustard

ingredients.item: One 14- to 17-ounce box of puff pastry (preferably all-butter)
Fully cooked german-style sausage such as bockwurst or bratwurst

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C. Set racks in the upper and lower thirds of the oven. Line two 13x18-inch baking sheets with parchment paper. In a small bowl, beat the egg with 1 tablespoon water. Prep the ingredients for the filling and set aside.

If using a 17-ounce puff pastry package, roll each sheet to a 9x12-inch rectangle. Cut each piece lengthwise into eight 1 1/2-inch wide strips. Cut each strip crosswise into two pieces, about 4 1/2 inches long. You should have 32 pieces of pastry.

Spread the center of each piece of pastry with 1/2 teaspoon mustard and top with 1/2 teaspoon sauerkraut. Brush one narrow end of the pastry with egg wash, add one piece of sausage, and roll to enclose. Return to parchment-lined baking sheets. Brush the top of each pastry with egg wash and sprinkle with caraway seeds, seam-side down. Chill in refrigerator for 15 minutes. Bake until golden brown and puffed, 23 to 27 minutes.

pineapple-vinegar-recipe-lezzet.name: Pineapple Vinegar Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cup apple cider vinegar (for start culture, optional)
A clean jar or glass bottle
If you do not want to use sugar, prefer natural fruit sugars.
Posted on the request, you can prepare a light sweet version by adding honey or map.
Tarçinçubling or a fewyou can add flavor of adding cloves.

pink-peppercorn-bacon.name: Pink Peppercorn Bacon
instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 400°. Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with foil and fit with wire racks. Place bacon on racks and sprinkle with half of pink and black pepper. Bake 15 minutes, turn, sprinkle with remaining pink and black pepper, and rotate baking sheets. Bake bacon until brown and crisp, 15–20 minutes longer.

pink-pickled-turnips.name: Pink Pickled Turnips
instructions: Combine beet, chile (if using), and turnips in a 1-qt. heatproof jar or container.
Bring vinegar, salt, sugar, and 1½ cups water to a boil in a medium saucepan, stirring occasionally to dissolve sugar.
Pour pickling liquid over turnip mixture and let cool. Cover and chill at least 1 week before using.
DO AHEAD: Turnip mixture can be pickled 4 weeks ahead. Keep chilled.

piroski-with-potato-and-sausage-argiro.name: Piroski With Potato And Sausage
instructions: In a bowl, add the flour and yeast and beat the milk, sugar, salt, yolk and butter and add them to the flour.
Mix the ingredients until collected in a ball.
Work the dough on a floured surface until it becomes smooth, soft and supple.
Place it in a bowl, cover it and allow it to rest and double in volume, in a lukewarm spot, for about 45 minutes.
Clean and melt potatoes with fork.
Remove the casing from the sausages and chop them.
Melt the butter and sauté the onion and leek until they become transparent.
Add the sausage.
Mix to bake.
Finally, add the potato and salt and pepper.
Allow the filling to cool.
Empty the dough on the counter and press it to deflate.
We lightly ferment it.
Open a sheet with a thickness of 0.5 cm and cut discs with a diameter of 10 cm.
Add 1 tablespoon filling and wet the edges.
Close the compounds and roll the piroski in our hand, giving it a sausage shape.
We touch the piroskis on sheet coated with parchment paper, sparsely between them, because they swell.
After finishing, let them deflate for 15 to 20 minutes, spread them with egg solution or milk and make them in a well rehearsed evening at 170°C, for about 25 minutes until golden.

pitaya-bowl-recipe-comedera.name: Pitaya Bowl Recipe
instructions: We start production by adding frozen pitaya to the blender.
Then add the frozen mango, banana into frozen cuts and the two tablespoons of coconut milk. Triture up to get a thick blend.
Agrega la mezcla lista a un bowl para servir y decora con el kiwi.
Once the kiwi has been put up, you can add the fruit used for production and the seeds to taste.
Enjoy right away!

pizza-roll-lezzet.name: Pizza Roll
instructions: 1. melt the margarine for cradle sauce.
2. Add the milk slowly by adding the unu azar azar and stirring constantly in the jealous fire.
3. Bake until it comes to the consistency of the opponent.
4. Peel the bark of tomatoes and slightly chop it.

pizza-with-cassava-dough-in-a-pan-prepar.name: Pizza With Cassava Dough In A Pan: Prepare Step By Step
pizza-with-cassava-dough-in-a-pan-prepar.original_name: Pizza con masa de yuca en sartén: prepara paso a paso

ingredients.item: 400 g of peeled and baked yucas (about 1 ½ cups already cooked)
2 cds of grated cheese (mozzarella, coastal or parmesan)
1 cda of yucoa or maicene starch ((optional, more firma))
1 cdote olive oil or butter for frying
4 cdas de salsa de tomate natural o casera
Hojas de albahaca fresca o espinaca baby
Black and oregan pepper to taste
Un chorrito de aceite de oliva (virgen extra (opcional) )

instructions: Fitted with salt and water till very soft, remove the central vein and tighten with a fork or press while hot.
In a bowl, mix the yucca with the egg, grated cheese, a pint of salt and starch if you choose to use it. Fold with your hands up to a homogenous and molded mix.
Warm up an anti-stick frying pan with medium-low heat and slightly grease with oil or butter.
It puts the mass at the centre and with his hands or a spatula, extidate it and form a disc about 1 cm thick.
Kitchen with cover for 5 to 7 minutes or till the base is golden and firm.
Da la vuelta con cuidado usando un plato grande o una tapa plana, como si fuera una tortilla o arepa.
Cover the baked surface with salsa, cheese, tomatoes and other ingredients that you choose.
Replate and cook another 5 to 7 minutes till the cheese's completely melted and the base's cracking out and soft inside.
Retira del fuego, deja reposar 2 minutos y sirve caliente con albahaca fresca por encima.

pina-colada-pudding-shots.name: Piña Colada Pudding Shots!

ingredients.item: Instant coconut cream pie pudding mix
Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Whisk together milk, vodka, rum, and pudding mix in a large bowl until combined. Stir in whipped topping until a pudding-like consistency is reached.
Spoon into shot glasses and refrigerate until set, at least 30 minutes.

poached-arctic-char-with-basil-tarragon-.name: Poached Arctic Char With Basil-tarragon Mayonnaise

ingredients.item: Extra-virgin olive oil plus more for serving

instructions: Blend egg yolks, lemon juice, and mustard powder in a blender. Add basil and 1/4 cup tarragon. With machine running, drizzle in 3/4 cup oil; blend until smooth. Transfer mayonnaise to a small bowl, cover, and chill.

Combine tarragon sprigs, garlic, 2 tablespoons kosher salt, and 6 cups water in a large deep, lidded skillet and bring to a boil. Add fish, cover, and remove skillet from heat. Let stand until fish is just opaque in the center, 6-8 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook asparagus in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes; drain.
Serve fish with asparagus; top with mayonnaise, drizzle with some oil, and sprinkle with sea salt.
DO AHEAD: Mayonnaise can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

pommes-anna-with-gruyere.name: Pommes Anna With Gruyère
instructions: Combine salt, pepper, and thyme in a bowl.
Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir onions until soft and golden brown, about 8 minutes. Move to a bowl.
Melt remaining 1 tablespoon butter in the skillet; remove from heat.

Arrange 1/3 of potato slices in the skillet in a slightly overlapping layer. Sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon of the salt mixture. Top with 1/2 of the onions and 1/2 of the Gruyere cheese. Repeat layers, ending with potatoes; sprinkle with remaining salt mixture.

Cover and cook over medium-low heat, reducing heat to low if necessary, until potatoes are tender, about 30 minutes. Uncover and continue cooking, about 5 minutes. Run a spatula around edges to loosen; let cool, 5 to 10 minutes.
Invert potatoes carefully onto a serving dish.

pork-with-nuoc-cham.name: Pork With Nuoc Cham
instructions: Prepare a grill for medium heat. Whisk lime juice, fish sauce, sugar, and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl until sugar is dissolved. Stir in garlic and cilantro stems; set nuoc cham aside.

Place pork on a rimmed baking sheet and season generously on both sides with salt and pepper, then drizzle with oil and turn pork to coat. Grill, turning often and moving around on grill to prevent flare-ups, until lightly charred all over and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center registers 140° for medium), 12–15 minutes. Transfer meat to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes before slicing.
Spoon some of nuoc cham over pork and top with cilantro leaves. Serve remaining sauce alongside.

pork-mushroom-and-arugula-salad.name: Pork, Mushroom, And Arugula Salad
instructions: Toss pork, mushrooms, and arugula with mustard dressing; top with pepitas.

port-wine-cheese-ball.name: Port Wine Cheese Ball

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Toast ¾ cup sliced almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and let cool. Set aside.

Meanwhile, line a bowl large enough to hold your fist with a sheet of plastic wrap, leaving a 3" overhang. Process 4 oz. cream cheese, room temperature, 4 oz. sharp or extra-sharp cheddar, coarsely grated (about 1¼ cups), 1 oz. blue cheese, room temperature, 3 Tbsp. ruby port, 1 tsp. onion powder, ½ tsp. garlic powder, ½ tsp. Worcestershire sauce, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. ground pepper in a food processor until smooth. Taste and add more onion powder, garlic powder, salt, and/or pepper if needed. Scrape cheese mixture into prepared bowl; lightly cover with plastic overhang. Chill until firm, about 2 hours.

Using plastic wrap, mold cheese mixture into a ball, then remove plastic and discard. Roll ball in reserved almonds, pressing gently to adhere and molding ball more if needed, until well coated (the ball will be easier to mold once it’s covered in nuts). Place cheese ball on a platter and chill in freezer until firm, about 30 minutes.

To serve, re-form cheese ball if needed and arrange assorted crackers around.
Do ahead: Cheese ball can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill in refrigerator. Chill in freezer 30 minutes just before serving.

porterhouse-steak.name: Porterhouse Steak

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Let steak sit at room temperature 30 minutes before cooking, which will help it cook quickly and more evenly.

Heat broiler. Heat a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high heat, then heat oil in pan until smoking. Season steak very generously with salt and pepper and cook until a deep brown crust forms on underside (do not turn), about 4 minutes. Transfer steak to a cutting board, turning it browned side up.

Cut meat from bone in 2 pieces (strip steak and filet mignon). Slice both pieces straight down perpendicular to the bone 1” thick. Replace sliced steak around the bone (it should look like a whole sliced steak) and return to skillet, browned side up. Top with butter and broil until butter is melted and steak is medium-rare, 4–6 minutes. Serve steak with buttery pan juices spooned over.

portobello-mushrooms-stuffed-with-eggpla.name: Portobello Mushrooms Stuffed With Eggplant
instructions: 1. After washing Portobello mushrooms, index the oven tray.
2. Cook on the oven 10 minutes, 180 degrees, adding salt, pepper, fresh thyme and 1 tooth fine chopped garlic.
3. Peel the shells of eggplants and chop them into 1 cm cubes.
4. Fire the middle until the gold color is taken in the olive oil.
5. 1 chopped garlic, cook for 2 minutes by adding 4 chopped phenol leaf and ricotta cheese.
6. Take olive oil and shrimps respectively to the pan you bite.

portuguese-style-broad-beans-teleculinar.name: Portuguese Style Broad Beans
instructions: Cut the ribs into pieces and put them in a bowl. Add chopped garlic teeth, sweet pepper, blond leaf, white wine, salt and pyri. Involve everything and let marinate for 30 minutes.
Light a pot with olive oil, let it heat up and core the sausages, previously cut into slices. Remove and reserve. Lay the chopped onion on the pot and let it cook until it gets golden.

Then add the jerky and let it blush. Add marinade, tomato pulp, sausages and beans. Water with some water, if necessary, and let it cook until everything becomes soft. Serve hot, decorating with cilantros.

pot-au-feu.name: Pot-au-feu

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Bring first 5 ingredients and 8 cups water to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring until sugar and salt dissolve. Remove from heat; let cool to room temperature. Place brisket and short ribs in a large baking dish. Pour brine over to cover completely. Cover and chill for at least 8 hours or overnight. Remove meat; rinse and set aside.

Place first 6 ingredients in center of a triple layer of cheesecloth. Gather up edges; tie with kitchen twine to form a bundle for bouquet garni. Wrap marrow bones in cheesecloth; tie into a bundle with twine. If desired, tie oxtails with twine around circumference to keep meat from falling off bones.

Place brisket, short ribs, bouquet garni, marrow bones, oxtails, beef bones, veal bones, veal breast, 2 chopped carrots, celery, and onion in a very large heavy pot. Add water to cover meat (about 7 qt.). Bring to a boil, skimming off any scum and fat that rise to the surface. Reduce heat and simmer, skimming occasionally, until short ribs are tender, 2–2 1/2 hours.

Transfer short ribs to a 13x9x2" baking dish; add 4 cups broth from pot and tent with foil to keep meat warm and moist. Add sausage to pot; continue simmering until sausage is cooked through and remaining meats are tender, about 30 minutes longer. Transfer sausage, brisket, oxtails, and marrow bones to dish with short ribs.

Place a large strainer over another large pot; strain broth, discarding remaining meats, bones, and other solids in strainer. (You should have about 10 cups broth.) Return broth to a boil; add rutabagas, cabbage, potatoes, and 2" pieces of carrots. Simmer until vegetables are tender but not mushy, about 30 minutes.
Mix first 5 ingredients in a small bowl to make salsa verde. Season with salt and pepper; set aside. Stir crème fraîche and horseradish in another small bowl; season with salt.
Transfer vegetables to a platter. Thinly slice brisket against the grain; cut sausage into 2" pieces. Return meats to baking dish.

Season broth in pot to taste with salt and pepper; divide among bowls. (Reserve broth from meats for another use.) Serve meats and vegetables with salsa verde, horseradish crème fraîche, and both mustards in small bowls alongside. Serve with toasted country bread.

potato-leek-soup-vichyssoise.name: Potato Leek Soup (vichyssoise)

ingredients.prep: or more as needed to adjust thickness

instructions: Melt butter in soup pot over medium-high heat. Add leeks and salt; cook until leeks begin to wilt. Reduce heat to medium or medium-low and cook until soft and almost pastelike, 30 to 40 minutes.

Place potatoes in the pot; add chicken broth. Adjust heat so mixture simmers slowly. Cook until potatoes are soft, about 30 minutes. Puree mixture with an immersion blender or in batches in a blender. Whisk in heavy cream and creme fraiche. Heat over medium heat. Add more salt, if needed, and cayenne pepper. Do not boil.
Serve with a drizzle of creme fraiche and a sprinkle of chopped chives.

prepare-a-delicious-pastrami-sandwich-wi.name: Prepare A Delicious Pastrami Sandwich With Rye Bread At Home
prepare-a-delicious-pastrami-sandwich-wi.original_name: Prepara en casa un rico sándwich de pastrami con pan de centeno

instructions: Warm a large frying pan with medium heat and add butter.
place pastrami plates into the frying pan to warm them slightly and enhance their smoked smell. Don't cook them too much so they don't lose juicy.
It slightly holds the cuts of rye bread till they are golden and crisp out but still soft inside.

Serve hot with your favorite garrison

prepare-this-panettone-with-creams-and-f.name: Prepare This Panettone With Creams And Fruits
prepare-this-panettone-with-creams-and-f.original_name: Prepara este panettone con cremas y frutas
instructions: Utilizar un panettone, corta por encima y escarba en el medio.
Acomoda el pan retirado en una bandeja de hornear, la rebanada que se corto por encima del panettone se corta en cubitos.
Derrite la mantequilla y esparce por encima del pan en la bandeja.
Lleva al horno por 20 minutos a una temperatura de 375 grados.
Bate la crema espesa junto con el queso crema, hasta combinar y lograr la cremosidad de ambas. Reserva.
Add a layer of toasted bread, a layer of cream and a cape of both oranges and a layer of raisins and so on you have finished with cream and slice of orange above.
Decorate up with more fruit and some peppermint pits.

prepare-vegetable-and-buckwheat-soup-com.original_name: Prepara sopa de verduras y trigo sarraceno

instructions: Peel his garlic teeth and onion. Cut into very small cubes both.
Cut pumpkins and pitted carrot into medium cubes. He's tripping his leek and his parsley.
Warm up an olive oil casserole and spray garlic by onion for a few minutes.
Incorporates carrot and leeks, mixes and pits for another two minutes.
Wash the Saracene wheat and add it to the casserole. Meg and paddle till I get some sleep.

After that time, add the pumpkin with the parsley. Mix and cook for 10 more minutes till everything's soft.
You have to rectify the salt taste and be sure to cook the Saracene wheat.
Once ready, turn off and let some rest. Serve and enjoy.

puff-pastry.name: Puff Pastry
instructions: Whisk sugar, salt, and 2½ cups flour in a large bowl to combine. Grate ½ cup butter on the large holes of a box grater directly into bowl (work quickly so the butter doesn’t soften too much in your hands).
Thinly slice remaining ¾ cup butter and add to bowl. Toss to coat butter, then quickly smash slices with your fingers into smaller, flatter pieces.

Gradually drizzle in 7 Tbsp. ice water, tossing constantly with a fork to distribute. Using your hands, knead dough a couple of times in bowl to bring together in large clumps. Transfer clumps to a piece of plastic wrap, leaving dry bits behind. Toss dry bits in bowl, drizzling in more ice water by the teaspoonful as needed, until they hold together when squeezed in your hand (it will be very dry, which is normal).
Add to dough on plastic and wrap tightly, forming into a 6" square. Flatten, pushing dough into corners and pressing out any air pockets. Chill 2 hours.
Let dough sit at room temperature about 4 minutes to soften. Roll out on a lightly floured surface into a long rectangle about ¼" thick.
Fold into thirds like a letter and rotate 90°. Repeat rolling and folding process, dusting with more flour as needed. Rewrap tightly and chill at least 30 minutes before using.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

puffed-pears-teleculinaria.name: Puffed Pears
instructions: Wash the pears and remove the central part with a gin. Extend the leafy dough and cut it into five rectangles. Wrap a pear in each piece of dough, leaving the top open, and place them on a board.

Distribute the sugar and cinnamon powder through the pear openings and put a cinnamon stick in each one. Brush the leafy dough with the yolk beaten and light in the oven, preheated to 180oC, for 30 minutes or until the dough is well golden.
Retire as peras do forno, deixe arrefecer um pouco e sirva.

puffed-wheat-squares.name: Puffed Wheat Squares
instructions: Grease a 9x13-inch pan. Place cereal in a large heat-proof bowl.
Bring corn syrup, white sugar, butter, cocoa powder, and brown sugar to a boil in a heavy saucepan. Remove from the heat and stir in vanilla; pour over cereal and stir until very well combined.
Press mixture into the prepared pan. Allow to cool completely before cutting into 24 squares, at least 1 hour or up to one day.

pumpkin-caramel-bourbon-poke-cake.name: Pumpkin Caramel Bourbon Poke Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line an 8-inch square cake pan with parchment paper.
Beat pumpkin puree, sugar, oil, eggs, pumpkin pie spice, and vanilla extract together in a bowl.
Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt into a bowl. Add to the pumpkin mixture; stir until just combined. Pour into prepared pan; smooth top with a spatula.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the middle comes out clean, 35 to 40 minutes.

Combine caramel sauce and 1 1/2 teaspoons bourbon in a saucepan over low heat; warm through, about 2 minutes. Poke holes evenly over the surface of the cake using a chopstick. Reserve 1 teaspoon of the caramel-bourbon mixture; pour remaining mixture over the cake. Place on cooling rack.
Beat cream and remaining 1 1/2 teaspoons bourbon in a bowl using an electric mixer until soft peaks form. Spoon whipped cream on cake; scatter pecans and drizzle reserved caramel sauce on top.

pumpkin-cheesecake-bars.name: Pumpkin Cheesecake Bars
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the melted butter and crushed graham crackers. Stir until the mixture develops a wet sand texture.
Cover the bottom of a greased 9 x13-inch (23x33 cm) baking pan with the graham cracker mixture and spread evenly. Chill in the refrigerator while you make the filling.
In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, eggs, vanilla, and sugar. Stir until smooth.
Spread half of the cheesecake batter over the crust, smoothing the top. Freeze until set, 15-20 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 325˚F (160˚C).
Add the pumpkin puree to the remaining cheesecake batter and stir until incorporated.
Spoon the pumpkin cheesecake batter over frozen cheesecake layer and spread evenly.
Bake for 30 minutes.
Make the crumb topping: in a medium bowl, combine the butter, flour, brown sugar, and cinnamon. Stir until all ingredients are evenly incorporated and the mixture develops a wet sand texture.
Top the cheesecake with the crumble topping and bake for another 25 minutes.
Allow the cheesecake to cool at room temperature. For best results refrigerate overnight once completely cooled, then slice and serve.
Enjoy!

purple-carrot-cake.name: Purple Carrot Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish with butter.
Combine grated carrots, brown sugar sugar, white sugar, and lemon zest in a bowl. Toss to coat and allow the natural juices to come out. Set aside.
Mix flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a separate bowl.

Whisk eggs, applesauce, oil, and vanilla extract together in a large bowl. Add flour mixture 1/4 cup at a time, mixing until just combined. Fold in carrot-sugar mixture with all the juice that has accumulated. Add food coloring. Pour batter into the prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 45 minutes.
Cool cake on a wire rack for 5 minutes. Run a table knife around the edges of the pan to loosen. Invert cake carefully onto a serving plate or cooling rack. Let cool completely.
